document_summary: Dehuan Liu's faculty profile page at School of New Media, Peking University. Lists his title as Professor, position as Vice Dean, with a Doctorate degree. Education: BS (1985-1989), MS (1989-1992), PhD (1999-2001) all in Sociology at Peking University. Career: Lecturer (1992-2001), Associate Professor (2002-2007), Professor (2007-2014) at School of J&C, then Professor and Vice Dean at School of New Media (Feb. 2014-present). Also President of CMRA, Vice President of China Association of Market Information and Research, Director of Market and Media Research Center at PKU.

snippets.text: In 2008, he was selected as a scholar of Beijing "Hundred Talents Project"

snippets.text: His book Age Theory: Social Time in Social Space won the third prize of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences).
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Confirms Age Theory won MOE Third Prize - a national-level academic award administered by the Ministry of Education.
